race.description: Nbn News Springboard To Fame 2yo Showcase Plate
race.comment: ROYAL EXILE (8) is a promising juvenile back from a five-month spell. The maiden prep was highlighted by a close second in a metro quality 1200m race at Wyong at the second career run. Looked good in a recent Taree trial so a bright return is on the cards. SLIPPIN' AWAY (9) resumed with an effortless all-the-way victory recently over 1015m at this track. Has only been to the races twice so there is a stack of upside. AIRBORNE AFFAIR (2) started at $1.90 and got the job done on debut last start at Rockhampton. Kept fresh and should not be underestimated. ZEE FIRE (13) produced a real eye-catcher on debut here behind SLIPPIN' AWAY 11 days ago. Can improve enough to turn the tables. TRIPLE SEVEN (1) is an Astern gelding on debut. Showing plenty at the trials and the early money suggests a strong performance is anticipated.
